revisions: Tightened Table 1 (demographic); clarified that EDSS/SDMT/duration/treatment are not numerically summarised in the extraction.
Added Supplementary Fig. S1 reference for MBP null result and Supplementary Fig. S2 for the ROI-based disease-duration analysis.
Expanded immunohistochemistry results with a dissociation-rationale paragraph break.
Added explicit protocol-matching caveat as a fifth limitation in the Discussion.
Strengthened the Abstract closing sentence into an explicit translational-impact statement.
Expanded rat-results opening paragraph with methodological detail on the 100-step sampling.
Added opening bridging sentences to the NAWM, lesion and clinical-associations results subsections so each begins with context before method.
Explicitly described the NIA at its first use in Results and its role in removing anatomical baselines.
Added a reference to van Waesberghe (1999) at the point where lesion-type stratification is motivated in Results.
Clarified that the NAWM analysis was run on fibre-dispersion-aware AxCaliber maps so crossing-fibre voxels are included.
